items.title: China Plans More Non-Fossil Power
items.english: Recent oil shocks have strengthened Beijing's resolve as it tries to balance decarbonisation efforts with securing future energy demand. China is charting an ambitious five-year plan to harness nuclear and other non-fossil sources in a bid to generate half of the country's electricity needs by 2030.
items.chinese: 最近的石油冲击增强了北京的决心。中国正努力在推进脱碳和保障未来能源需求之间取得平衡。中国正在制定一项雄心勃勃的五年计划，希望利用核能和其他非化石能源，到2030年满足全国一半的电力需求。

english.text: Recent oil shocks have strengthened Beijing's resolve as it tries to balance decarbonisation efforts with securing future energy demand.
China is charting an ambitious five-year plan to harness nuclear and other non-fossil sources in a bid to generate half of the country's electricity needs by 2030.

chinese.text: 最近的石油冲击增强了北京的决心。
中国正努力在推进脱碳和保障未来能源需求之间取得平衡。
中国正在制定一项雄心勃勃的五年计划，希望利用核能和其他非化石能源，到2030年满足全国一半的电力需求。
